title: Assingning a Team in people column

posts.author: BarryvK (Barry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a shareable board to which I’ve created a Team (~15 persons) to provide access to the board (invited the team). This board only has items, no subitems.

The issue I’m currently finding is that when I want to assign that Team to an item, I get the following notice:

“Hold it… First assign the user / team to the item and then to its subitem. The item is currently hidden to them”

It’s seems to be referring to subitems, which are non-existant and it stays the item is hidden to them. This whole Team has been invited to the board and permissions are not restricted (View all items on the board).

Anyone that can shed some light on this?

Thanks in advance,
Barry

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you share a screenshot of the error? Would be helpful to see it.

posts.author: DrewBeFree (Drew Webb)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BarryvK

  • Have you resolved this? I’m having the same issue. Thanks!

posts.author: BarryvK (Barry)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Drew, the problem sorted itself after a few days and has not occurred again. At the time I did have the Teams just created. Perhaps it takes a while (I only checked again a few days after) for the system to recognize newly created Teams?

posts.cookedHtml: Yes @Clover_Gal I was trying to assign the team to an item.

posts.cookedHtml: Did you get this resolved? We are having the same issue, so I have just opened a support ticket.
